analysis: imaging-only MCI->AD conversion, split by plasma availability
method: probe.auc_ci_perm: site-disjoint CV, in-fold auto-PCA, bootstrap CI, permutation null, repeated-CV ensembling

context.note: The fusion arm is limited to plasma-present subjects. Imaging alone extends conversion prediction to the plasma-absent population (701 subjects / 270 converters) and to the full 412-converter cohort — the complementary value plasma cannot provide, not a claim that imaging beats plasma.

compliance: Frozen/derived features only; AUC-grade numbers only.
